description: Phase 71 - QuantAI Codex & Cross-App Automation: Create packages/quant-codex (project scaffolding, multi-agent build orchestration, deploy pipeline, voice command interface) and packages/quant-automate (trigger system with cron, event-driven actions, durable execution, NL automation builder).
steps: Step 1 - Create packages/quant-codex/package.json: Name @quant/quant-codex, deps on @quant/common workspace:*, @quant/agent-swarm workspace:*. Include typecheck/test/build/lint scripts. Create tsconfig.json.

Step 2 - Create src/types.ts with: ProjectTemplate (id, name, type: game|app|tool|agent|lens, files, dependencies, scripts), CodexProject (id, name, template, status, branches, agents, artifacts, logs), BuildStep, DeployTarget, AgentTask, CodexCommand, ScaffoldResult, BuildResult, DeployResult interfaces.

Step 3 - Create src/scaffolder/project-scaffolder.ts: ProjectScaffolder class with scaffold(template, options) method that generates project file structures from templates. Has registerTemplate(template), listTemplates(), getTemplate(id) methods. Templates for game, app, tool, agent, lens project types.

Step 4 - Create src/scaffolder/templates.ts: Define 5 built-in templates (game-template with HTML5 canvas boilerplate, app-template with React SPA, tool-template with CLI structure, agent-template with agent-swarm integration, lens-template with AR/visual component). Each has files array, dependencies, and scripts.

Step 5 - Create src/orchestrator/build-orchestrator.ts: BuildOrchestrator class that decomposes a build task into sub-tasks, assigns them to virtual agents (leveraging agent-swarm patterns), tracks progress, handles failures with retry. Methods: decompose(project), assignAgents(tasks), build(project), getStatus(projectId).

Step 6 - Create src/orchestrator/deploy-pipeline.ts: DeployPipeline class with stages: validate, build, test, package, publish. Methods: run(project, target), getStage(projectId), rollback(projectId). Supports dry-run mode.

Step 7 - Create src/commands/voice-interface.ts: CodexVoiceInterface class that parses voice/text commands into codex actions. Methods: parseCommand(input) returning CodexCommand, execute(command, context), getSuggestions(partial). Supports 'build X', 'scaffold Y', 'deploy Z', 'status' commands.

Step 8 - Create src/state/project-state.ts: ProjectStateManager class with createProject(), updateStatus(), addLog(), getBranches(), getArtifacts() methods. Maintains in-memory project state with full history.
Step 9 - Create src/index.ts exporting all public APIs.
Step 10 - Create src/__tests__/codex.test.ts with at least 15 tests: scaffolding from templates, build orchestration, deploy pipeline stages, voice command parsing, project state management.

Step 11 - Create packages/quant-automate/package.json: Name @quant/quant-automate, deps on @quant/common workspace:*, @quant/quant-tools workspace:* (if quant-tools was built in FEAT-002). Include typecheck/test/build/lint scripts. Create tsconfig.json.

Step 12 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/types.ts with: Automation (id, name, triggers, actions, conditions, status, durableState), Trigger (type: schedule|event|webhook|manual|ai-condition, config), AutomationAction (toolId, params, retryPolicy), FlowControl (type: condition|branch|loop|retry, config), DurableState (checkpoints, currentStep, resumable), CronSchedule, EventTrigger, WebhookConfig, AutomationTemplate interfaces.

Step 13 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/triggers/trigger-system.ts: TriggerSystem class with registerTrigger(automation, trigger), evaluateCron(schedule), handleEvent(event), handleWebhook(request), checkAICondition(condition). Has internal scheduling for cron triggers using parsed cron expressions.

Step 14 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/triggers/cron-parser.ts: CronParser class that parses cron expressions (minute hour day month weekday) into next-execution timestamps. Methods: parse(expression), getNextRun(expression, after), isValid(expression), describe(expression) returning human-readable description.

Step 15 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/execution/action-executor.ts: ActionExecutor class that invokes quant-tools actions. Methods: execute(action, context), executeWithRetry(action, retryPolicy), getResult(executionId). Handles timeouts and error states.

Step 16 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/execution/flow-controller.ts: FlowController class implementing conditions (if/else), branches (parallel paths), loops (repeat N times or until condition), and retry with backoff. Methods: evaluateCondition(condition, data), executeLoop(steps, config), executeBranch(branches, data).

Step 17 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/execution/durable-executor.ts: DurableExecutor class with checkpoint(state), resume(automationId), getState(automationId) methods. Persists execution state to survive restarts. Uses in-memory store with serialization support.

Step 18 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/builder/nl-builder.ts: NLAutomationBuilder class that parses natural language automation descriptions into Automation objects. Methods: parse(description), suggest(partial), getTemplates(). Handles patterns like 'every day at 9am, post a reel' or 'when I get an email from X, forward to Y'.

Step 19 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/templates/automation-templates.ts: Define built-in automation templates: daily-reel (schedule + neon post), backup (schedule + drive sync), notification-routing (event + chat send), email-forward (event + mail send), meeting-prep (schedule + docs create + calendar check).
Step 20 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/index.ts exporting all public APIs.

Step 21 - Create packages/quant-automate/src/__tests__/automate.test.ts with at least 15 tests: cron parsing, trigger evaluation, action execution, flow control (conditions, loops, branches), durable state checkpoint/resume, NL parsing.
acceptance_criteria: packages/quant-codex/ is a complete package with scaffolder, orchestrator, deploy pipeline, voice interface
ProjectScaffolder generates projects from 5 template types
BuildOrchestrator decomposes and assigns agent tasks
CodexVoiceInterface parses voice/text commands into codex actions
packages/quant-automate/ is a complete package with triggers, execution, durable state, NL builder
CronParser correctly parses cron expressions and calculates next runs
DurableExecutor checkpoints and resumes execution state
NLAutomationBuilder parses natural language into automation definitions
At least 30 tests pass across both packages
verification: pnpm typecheck - should pass with 0 errors including quant-codex and quant-automate
pnpm test - should pass including 30+ new tests
findings: All 47 tests pass (22 codex + 25 automate). Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged during commit. Full monorepo typecheck (116 tasks) and test (119 tasks) pass. Both packages are self-contained with no workspace dependencies on each other.
